```{python}
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=10/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=10/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=10/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=5/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=5/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=5/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=15/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=15/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=15/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=20/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=20/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=20/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=50/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=50/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=50/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=100/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)
fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=100/365$')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle(r'$\rho=100/365$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

## Simulations - ala params

Tumour Simulation - $D_c=10/365, D_h=10D_c, \rho=10/365$

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=10/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)

plt.show()
```

### initial 5-ala amount

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=0.1v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=0.5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=0.5v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=5*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=5v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=10*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=10v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

a0=100*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$a_o(0)=100v(365)$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

### $r_c$

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=0.1
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=0.1$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=0.5
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=0.5$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=1
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=1$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=2
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=2$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=5
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=5$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=10
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_c=10$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

### gamma - $r_c/r_h$

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=1
r_h=0.1*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_h=0.1r_c$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=1
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_h=0.5r_c$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=1
r_h=1*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_h=r_c$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=0.1
r_h=2*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_h=2r_c$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
p=sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N]
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplots()
axs1=axs.twinx()
axs1.set(ylim=(0,1),yticks=[])
axs1.axhspan(0,c[100],alpha=0.3,color='green')
axs1.axhspan(c[100],h[100]+c[100],alpha=0.3,color='orange')
axs1.axhspan(h[100]+c[100],n[100]+h[100]+c[100],alpha=0.3,color='red')

axs.plot(t_eval,p[100,:],color='blue')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplots()
axs1=axs.twinx()
axs1.set(ylim=(0,1),yticks=[])
axs1.axhspan(0,c[100],alpha=0.3,color='green')
axs1.axhspan(c[100],h[100]+c[100],alpha=0.3,color='orange')
axs1.axhspan(h[100]+c[100],n[100]+h[100]+c[100],alpha=0.3,color='red')

axs.plot(t_eval,p[100,:],color='blue')

plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplots()
axs1=axs.twinx()
axs1.set(ylim=(0,1),yticks=[])
axs1.axhspan(0,c[75],alpha=0.3,color='green')
axs1.axhspan(c[75],h[75]+c[75],alpha=0.3,color='orange')
axs1.axhspan(h[75]+c[75],n[75]+h[75]+c[75],alpha=0.3,color='red')

axs.plot(t_eval,p[75,:],color='blue')

plt.show()
```

# Figures

## PIHNA simulation plots

```{python}
D_c=10/365
D_h=10*D_c
rho=10/365
tmax=365
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)

c0=0.25*K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/1**2)
h0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
n0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
v0=np.full(N,0.03*K,dtype=np.float64)#K*np.exp(-(xx-L/2)**2/0.1**2)
a0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_pihna=np.concatenate((c0,h0,n0,v0,a0))
sol_pihna=solve_ivp(pinha1d_central,tspan,z0_pihna,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['Day 0', 'Day 365', 'Day 730']],layout='constrained',figsize=(12,4))
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')
axs['Day 0'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')

axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,25],color='green')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange')
axs['Day 365'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='red')

axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,-2],color='green')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-2],color='orange')
axs['Day 730'].plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-2],color='red')

axs['Day 0'].set(title='Day 0')
axs['Day 365'].set(title='Day 182')
axs['Day 730'].set(title='Day 365')

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic')]
axs['Day 730'].legend(handles=custom_lines)

plt.show()
```

### Animation 

```{python}
fig,ax=plt.subplots()

green_line=ax.plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[0:N,0],color='green')[0]
orange_line=ax.plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange')[0]
red_line=ax.plot(xx,sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='red')[0]
ax.set(ylim=(0,0.4))
ax.set(xlabel='t (Hours)',ylabel='Cells')

def update(frame):
    y_green=sol_pihna.y[0:N,frame]
    y_orange=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,frame]
    y_red=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,frame]
    green_line.set_ydata(y_green)
    orange_line.set_ydata(y_orange)
    red_line.set_ydata(y_red)
    return (green_line,orange_line,red_line)

ani=animation.FuncAnimation(fig=fig,func=update,frames=nplots,interval=250)
ani.save('pihna_1d.mp4')
plt.show()
```

## ALA simulation plots
```{python}
c=sol_pihna.y[0:N,-1]
h=sol_pihna.y[N:2*N,-1]
n=sol_pihna.y[2*N:3*N,-1]
v=sol_pihna.y[3*N:4*N,-1]
a=sol_pihna.y[4*N:,-1]

tmax=24
nplots=51

ii,im1,ip1,iip,ipre=index_helpers(N)
dx=L/(N-1)

xx=np.linspace(0,L,N)
tspan=[0,tmax]
t_eval=np.linspace(0,tmax,nplots)
rng=np.random.default_rng(1)
r_c=1
r_h=0.5*r_c

a0=0.1*v
ah0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
ac0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
p0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
po0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)
hi0=np.zeros(N,dtype=np.float64)

z0_ala=np.concatenate((a0,ah0,ac0,p0,po0,hi0))
sol_ala=solve_ivp(ala_central,tspan,z0_ala,t_eval=t_eval,method='RK45')
print(f'RK45 Solving succesful: {sol_pihna.success}')

fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['ao','po','ah'],['p','hi','ac']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,4))

axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ao'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[0:N,-1],color='orange')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['po'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[4*N:5*N,-1],color='blue')
axs['ao'].set_title('5-ALA - Outside Cell')
axs['po'].set_title('PpIX - Outside Cell')

axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,0],color='orange',linestyle='--')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,25],color='orange',linestyle='-.')
axs['ah'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[N:2*N,-1],color='orange')

axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,0],color='green',linestyle='--')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,25],color='green',linestyle='-.')
axs['ac'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[2*N:3*N,-1],color='green')

axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
axs['p'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')

axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,0],color='red',linestyle='--')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,25],color='red',linestyle='-.')
axs['hi'].plot(xx,sol_ala.y[5*N:,-1],color='red')

axs['ah'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Hypoxic')
axs['ac'].set_title('5-ALA - Inside Normoxic')
axs['p'].set_title('PpIX - Inside')
axs['hi'].set_title('Heme - Inside')

axs['ao'].set(xticks=[])
axs['po'].set(xticks=[])
axs['ah'].set(xticks=[])

fig.suptitle('$r_h=0.5r_c$')

plt.show()

plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,0],color='blue',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,25],color='blue',linestyle='-.')
plt.plot(xx,sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N,-1],color='blue')
custom_lines_ala=[Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='--',label='Hour 0'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',linestyle='-.',label='Hour 12'),Line2D([0],[0],color='blue',label='Hour 24')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines_ala)
plt.ylabel('Fluorescence')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
p=sol_ala.y[3*N:4*N]
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['sims','sims'],['f','s']],layout='constrained',figsize=(10,6))

axs['sims'].plot(xx,c,color='green')
axs['sims'].plot(xx,h,color='orange')
axs['sims'].plot(xx,n,color='red')

axs['sims'].axvline(xx[50],color='purple',linestyle='--')
axs['sims'].axvline(xx[75],color='magenta',linestyle='--')
axs['sims'].axvline(xx[100],color='deeppink',linestyle='--')

axs['sims'].set(title='Tumour',ylabel='Cells')
axs['sims'].set_xticks(ticks=[xx[50],xx[75],xx[100]],labels=['Sample 1','Sample 2','Sample 3'])

custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='green',label='Normoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='orange',label='Hypoxic'),Line2D([0],[0],color='red',label='Necrotic')]
axs['sims'].legend(handles=custom_lines)

axs['f'].plot(t_eval,p[50,:],color='purple')
axs['f'].plot(t_eval,p[75,:],color='magenta')
axs['f'].plot(t_eval,p[100,:],color='deeppink')
```
