```{python}
axs['s'].set(ylim=(0,1))
axs1=axs['s'].twinx()

axs1.set_yticks(ticks=[0.95],labels=['Sample'])

axs['s'].axhspan(0.9,1,0,1/3,color='purple')
axs['s'].axhspan(0.9,1,1/3,2/3,color='magenta')
axs['s'].axhspan(0.9,1,2/3,1,color='deeppink')

axs['s'].axvline(1/3,color='k')
axs['s'].axvline(2/3,color='k')
axs['s'].axhline(0.9,color='k')

axs['s'].axhspan(h[50]+n[50],h[50]+n[50]+c[50],0,1/3,color='green',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(n[50],n[50]+h[50],0,1/3,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(0,n[50],0,1/3,color='red',alpha=0.5)

axs['s'].axhspan(h[75]+n[75],h[75]+n[75]+c[75],1/3,2/3,color='green',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(n[75],n[75]+h[75],1/3,2/3,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(0,n[75],1/3,2/3,color='red',alpha=0.5)

axs['s'].axhspan(h[100]+n[100],h[100]+n[100]+c[100],2/3,1,color='green',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(n[100],n[100]+h[100],2/3,1,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
axs['s'].axhspan(0,n[100],2/3,1,color='red',alpha=0.5)

axs['f'].set(title='Fluoresence',xlabel='t (Hours)',ylabel='Fluorescence')
axs['s'].set(yticks=[],title='Cell Type Proportions',xlabel='Sample')
axs['s'].set_xticks(ticks=[1/6,0.5,1-1/6],labels=['1','2','3'])

plt.show()
```

```{python}
plt.ylim(0,1)

plt.axhspan(h[50]+n[50],h[50]+n[50]+c[50],0,1/3,color='green',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(n[50],n[50]+h[50],0,1/3,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(0,n[50],0,1/3,color='red',alpha=0.5)

plt.axhspan(h[75]+n[75],h[75]+n[75]+c[75],1/3,2/3,color='green',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(n[75],n[75]+h[75],1/3,2/3,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(0,n[75],1/3,2/3,color='red',alpha=0.5)

plt.axhspan(h[100]+n[100],h[100]+n[100]+c[100],2/3,1,color='green',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(n[100],n[100]+h[100],2/3,1,color='orange',alpha=0.5)
plt.axhspan(0,n[100],2/3,1,color='red',alpha=0.5)

plt.show()
```

#### PpIX Animation

```{python}
fig,ax=plt.subplots()
ax1=plt.twinx()
fluorescence_line=ax.plot(xx,p[:,0],color='blue')[0]
ax.set(ylim=(0,1e-3))
def update(frame):
    fluorescence_data=p[:,frame]
    fluorescence_line.set_ydata(fluorescence_data)
    return (fluorescence_line)
ax1.plot(xx,c,color='green',zorder=-10)
ax1.plot(xx,h,color='orange',zorder=-10)
ax1.plot(xx,n,color='red',zorder=-10)
ax1.set(ylabel='Cells')
ax.axhline(1e-5,color='pink',linestyle='--')
ax.axhline(5e-5,color='mediumorchid',linestyle='--')
ax.axhline(1e-4,color='fuchsia',linestyle='--')
ax.axhline(5e-4,color='indigo',linestyle='--')
ax.set(ylabel='Fluorescence')
ani=animation.FuncAnimation(fig=fig,func=update,frames=nplots,interval=250)
ani.save('fluoresce_plot.mp4')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
resect_1,resect_2,resect_3,resect_4=np.zeros(p.shape[1]),np.zeros(p.shape[1]),np.zeros(p.shape[1]),np.zeros(p.shape[1])
for k in range(p.shape[1]):
    for i in range(p.shape[0]):
        if resect_1_ind[i,k]==1:
            resect_1[k]+=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_2_ind[i,k]==1:
            resect_2[k]+=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_3_ind[i,k]==1:
            resect_3[k]+=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_4_ind[i,k]==1:
            resect_4[k]+=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
```

```{python}
plt.plot(t_eval,resect_1,color='pink')
plt.plot(t_eval,resect_2,color='mediumorchid')
plt.plot(t_eval,resect_3,color='fuchsia')
plt.plot(t_eval,resect_4,color='indigo')
custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='pink',label=r'$p\geq 1\times 10^{-5}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='mediumorchid',label=r'$p\geq 5\times 10^{-5}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='fuchsia',label=r'$p\geq 1\times 10^{-4}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='indigo',label=r'$p\geq 5\times 10^{-4}$')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines,title='Fluorescence\nThreshold')
plt.axvline(3,color='red',linestyle='--')
plt.axvline(8,color='red',linestyle='--')
plt.xticks(ticks=[0,3,11/2,8,10,15,20,24],labels=[0,3,'Typical\nSurgical\nWindow',8,10,15,20,24])
plt.xlabel('t (Hours)',fontsize=15)
plt.ylabel('Cells removed in resection',fontsize=15)
plt.show()
```

```{python}
plt.plot(xx,c_resect_flair,color='green')
plt.plot(xx,h_resect_flair,color='orange')
plt.plot(xx,n_resect_flair,color='red')
plt.plot(xx,c_resect_t1,color='green',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,h_resect_t1,color='orange',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,n_resect_t1,color='red',linestyle='--')
custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='k',linestyle='--',label='T1Gd based resection'),Line2D([0],[0],color='k',label='FLAIR based resection')]
plt.legend(handles=custom_lines,bbox_to_anchor=(1,1))
plt.title('Imaging Based Resection')
plt.show()
```

#### Resection Plot

```{python}
t1gd_resect=[]
flair_resect=[]
for k in range(c.size):
    if c[k]+h[k]+n[k]>=0.8:
        t1gd_resect.append(k)
    if c[k]+h[k]+n[k]>=0.16:
        flair_resect.append(k)
```

```{python}
c_resect_t1,h_resect_t1,n_resect_t1=np.zeros_like(c),np.zeros_like(h),np.zeros_like(n)
c_resect_flair,h_resect_flair,n_resect_flair=np.zeros_like(c),np.zeros_like(h),np.zeros_like(n)
for k in range(c.size):
    if k in t1gd_resect:
        c_resect_t1[k]=0
        h_resect_t1[k]=0
        n_resect_t1[k]=0
    else:
        c_resect_t1[k]=c[k]
        h_resect_t1[k]=h[k]
        n_resect_t1[k]=n[k]
    if k in flair_resect:
        c_resect_flair[k]=0
        h_resect_flair[k]=0
        n_resect_flair[k]=0
    else:
        c_resect_flair[k]=c[k]
        h_resect_flair[k]=h[k]
        n_resect_flair[k]=n[k]
```

```{python}
resect_1_ind,resect_2_ind,resect_3_ind,resect_4_ind=np.zeros((p.shape[0],p.shape[1])),np.zeros((p.shape[0],p.shape[1])),np.zeros((p.shape[0],p.shape[1])),np.zeros((p.shape[0],p.shape[1]))
for i in range(p.shape[0]):
    for j in range(p.shape[1]):
        if p[i,j]>=1e-5:
            resect_1_ind[i,j]=1
        if p[i,j]>=5e-5:
            resect_2_ind[i,j]=1
        if p[i,j]>=1e-4:
            resect_3_ind[i,j]=1
        if p[i,j]>=5e-4:
            resect_4_ind[i,j]=1
```

### Flourescence Animation

```{python}
full_resect_1,full_resect_2,full_resect_3,full_resect_4=np.zeros_like(p),np.zeros_like(p),np.zeros_like(p),np.zeros_like(p)
for i in range(p.shape[0]):
    for j in range(p.shape[1]):
        if resect_1_ind[i,j]==1:
            full_resect_1[i,j]=0
        else:
            full_resect_1[i,j]=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_2_ind[i,j]==1:
            full_resect_2[i,j]=0
        else:
            full_resect_2[i,j]=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_3_ind[i,j]==1:
            full_resect_3[i,j]=0
        else:
            full_resect_3[i,j]=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
        if resect_4_ind[i,j]==1:
            full_resect_4[i,j]=0
        else:
            full_resect_4[i,j]=c[i]+h[i]+n[i]
```

```{python}
fig,ax=plt.subplots()

line1=ax.plot(xx,full_resect_1[:,0],color='pink')[0]
line2=ax.plot(xx,full_resect_2[:,0],color='mediumorchid')[0]
line3=ax.plot(xx,full_resect_3[:,0],color='fuchsia')[0]
line4=ax.plot(xx,full_resect_4[:,0],color='indigo')[0]
def update(frame):
    line1_data=full_resect_1[:,frame]
    line2_data=full_resect_2[:,frame]
    line3_data=full_resect_3[:,frame]
    line4_data=full_resect_4[:,frame]
    line1.set_ydata(line1_data)
    line2.set_ydata(line2_data)
    line3.set_ydata(line3_data)
    line4.set_ydata(line4_data)
    return (line1,line2,line3,line4)
custom_lines=[Line2D([0],[0],color='pink',label=r'$p\geq 1\times 10^{-5}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='mediumorchid',label=r'$p\geq 5\times 10^{-5}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='fuchsia',label=r'$p\geq 1\times 10^{-4}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='indigo',label=r'$p\geq 5\times 10^{-4}$'),Line2D([0],[0],color='red',linestyle='--',label='T1Gd'),Line2D([0],[0],color='green',linestyle='--',label='FLAIR')]
fig.legend(handles=custom_lines,bbox_to_anchor=(0.9,0.9))
plt.plot(xx,c_resect_t1+h_resect_t1+n_resect_t1,color='red',linestyle='--')
plt.plot(xx,c_resect_flair+h_resect_flair+n_resect_flair,color='green',linestyle='--')
ax.set(ylabel='Cells Remaining After Resection')
ani=animation.FuncAnimation(fig=fig,func=update,frames=nplots,interval=250)
ani.save('resection.mp4')
plt.show()
```

### Diffusion Figure

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['100','200']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,3))
for i in range(len(Dc_sols)):
    axs['100'].plot(xx,Dc_sols[i].y[0:N,25],color=cmap(i/len(Dc_sols)))
    axs['200'].plot(xx,Dc_sols[i].y[0:N,-1],color=cmap(i/len(Dc_sols)))
axs['200'].set(yticks=[],title='Day 200')
axs['100'].set(title='Day 100')
plt.show()
```

```{python}
fig,axs=plt.subplot_mosaic([['100','200']],layout='constrained',figsize=(8,3))
for i in range(len(rho_sols)):
    axs['100'].plot(xx,rho_sols[i].y[0:N,25],color=cmap(i/len(Dc_sols)))
    axs['200'].plot(xx,rho_sols[i].y[0:N,-1],color=cmap(i/len(Dc_sols)))
axs['200'].set(yticks=[],title='Day 200')
axs['100'].set(title='Day 100')
plt.show()
```
